content.title: Disaster Golf
descriptions: A spin on typical miniature golf video games. Use the forces of nature and a variety of natural disasters, from meteor strikes to black holes, to complete the course in the best possible time!
Created for IM 459 - Game Design Capstone to expand upon a pre-existing prototype.

content.title: Speedrun Shopping
descriptions: A game created given the theme of 'comedy', Speedrun Shopping is a frantic, fast-paced shopping simulator. Ram into other shoppers, steal items you need from them, and try to fill out your shopping list as quickly as you can!
Created for CIS 497 - Unity Design Patterns for practice working with design patterns on a large-scale project.

content.title: Shattered Shards
descriptions: A rapidly developed prototype made in around four weeks. Explore an eerie, distorted, abandoned school for notes left by previous captives to figure out what happened and how you'll get out. Keep your eyes peeled for the monster lurking the halls.
Created for IM 488 - Capstone Prototyping to develop prototypes that may be expanded upon senior year.
